'''''The Star Wars'' first draft''' was the first revision to the [[The Star Wars rough draft|rough draft]], written by [[George Lucas]] in [[July]] of [[1974]]. Most of the revision centered on names, and many of these changes were later rejected when George Lucas wrote the second draft, entitled ''[[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars]]'', in early [[1975]].<ref name="Secret History">{{BookCite|author=Kaminski, Michael|title=The Secret History of Star Wars|date=2007|publisher=Legacy Books Press}}</ref>

==Opening crawl==
{{OpeningCrawl
|name=THE STAR WARS
|text=Until the recent GREAT REBELLION,
the DAI NOGAS were the most
feared warriors in the universe.
For one hundred thousand years,
generations of DAI perfected their art
as the personal bodyguards of the King.
They were the chief architects of the
invincible ROYAL SPACE FORCE,
which expanded the King's power across
the galaxy, from the celestial equator
to the farthest stars.

Now these legendary warriors
are all but extinct. One by one,
they have been hunted down
and destroyed as enemies of
the NEW GALACTIC KINGDOM by a
ferocious and sinister rival
warrior sect, THE LEGIONS OF LETTOW.}}

==Continuity==
*The names of about half the characters, organizations and locations changed throughout the script.

*The sky of the [[Fourth Moon of Utapau|Fourth Moon of Ogana]] changed from "bleak" to red. Lakes were present on that moon, some green.

*The clouds of the [[Galactic Empire (The Star Wars)|Royal]] capital of [[Alderaan (The Star Wars)|Granicus]] have become yellow oxide instead of white oxide.

*The second [[handmaiden]], [[Alana]], was omitted. [[Mina (handmaiden)|Mina]] remained as a decoy [[princess]] at the [[Chatos Academy|Chathos Academy]] instead.
